loom.seed: A half-buried shrine beneath the ossuary

text: A five-room shrine dungeon assembled from modular parts.

dungeon.title: The Ossuary Shrine
dungeon.theme: Sacred ruin buried under the city
dungeon.goal: Recover the buried relic before the warding spirit awakens the dead.
dungeon.creator_lore: Built by a vanished priesthood to guard a relic, later sealed by collapse and time.

global_features.illumination: Dim green fungus and guttering relic candles
global_features.wall_material: Old stone mortared with bone dust
global_features.ceiling_height: Low and uneven in the deeper rooms
global_features.sounds: Drips, distant stone settling, and faint whispering

parts.label: The Half-Buried Shrine
parts.description: A cracked shrine chamber half swallowed by the earth.

parts.label: Root-Crowded Passage
parts.description: A narrow passage threaded with roots and old votive niches.

parts.label: The Reliquary Vault
parts.description: A sealed vault holding the relic behind carved stone and warding bones.

connections.notes: Bone-inlaid seal that opens with the right rite

dungeon.gm_advice: Use the shrine spirit to pace the reveal and keep the dungeon sacred rather than generic.
dungeon.seed: A half-buried shrine beneath the ossuary
